title: Kannamma Kanvizhi Song Lyrics Ratsasan
stanzas:
Kannamma Kanvizhi Song Lyrics From Ratsasan tamil movie. Kannamma Kanvizhi Song is composed by Ghibran and sung by Sean Rolden.  Kannamma Kan vizhi Lyrics writter is Ram Kumar.
Kannamma Kanvizhi Song Lyrics  kannamma kanvizhi
kanneerthaan en mozhi
nee illaa vaanathil
neelam thaan en vali

anbil nee
ennai soolntha gangai
annadhiyil moochadaitha
en vazhkai ini
ennaalum unnaale
naanaaven kaatrilandha
yaakkai.

idhu kanavaai maari
nee varuvaai
ena thinam thinam
vizhippom unakkenave

adhu varaiyil
ivazhvu adarvaname
ini eppodhu
ipboomi uyir perumo
sol ..

kannamma kanvizhi
kanneerthaan en mozhi
nee illaa vaanathil
neelam thaan en vali

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannamma Kanvizhi?

The song explores themes of longing and emotional depth, capturing the essence of love and melancholy.

Who composed the music for Kannamma Kanvizhi?

The music was composed by M Ghibran, known for his evocative compositions.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kannamma Kanvizhi?

The lyrics were penned by Ram Kumar, adding a poetic touch to the song.

What is the release year of the song Kannamma Kanvizhi?

The song was released in 2018.

Who is the singer of Kannamma Kanvizhi?

The song is sung by Sean Roldan, whose voice adds depth to the melody.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kannamma Kanvizhi is a poignant melody from the movie Ratsasan, capturing the emotional turmoil of love and longing. Sung by Sean Roldan, the song's soothing tune and melancholic lyrics by Ram Kumar evoke a deep sense of yearning. M Ghibran's composition enhances the emotional impact, making it a perfect backdrop for moments of introspection. The song beautifully conveys the pain of separation and the hope of reunion, resonating with anyone who has experienced love's complexities.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kannamma Kanvizhi from the movie Ratsasan is a soul-stirring melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. Sean Roldan's emotive vocals combined with M Ghibran's haunting composition create a mesmerizing experience. This collaboration brings out the depth of Ram Kumar's poignant lyrics, making it a must-listen for music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Where are you? I will come there. What else do I need?
The house where stars rest. A cage built in the mist.
Because of you, the darkness in this forest fades.
In love, you surround me like the Ganges. In that river, my life breathes. From now on, because of you, I will become like the wind-blown body.
This is like a dream, hoping you will come every day, just for you.
Until then, life is a struggle. When will this earth gain life? Tell me.
My dear, my eyes are filled with tears. Without you, the sky is just blue, and that's my pain.
Where are you? I will come there. What else do I need?
